---
title: "Alex Matrajt Frid"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:amatrajtfrid@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexmatrajt/
---

::: {.page-intro}
## About

::: {.lead-text}
I am a Master of Science in Business Analytics student at UC San Diego. I completed my B.S. in Data Science at the University of Michigan.
:::
:::

::: {.section-panel}
This site includes my projects, technical skills, blog posts, and resume.
:::
